title: Finance Core Suite v0.1
description: Evaluated finance suite proposal selected by task-based static and live tests. Not yet promoted to catalog/suites.

selection_policy.dedupe_rule: one primary skill per finance capability; keep multiple only when market coverage or workflow role differs

notes: Direct skills can run without API keys.
LLMQuant skills require LLMQuant Data MCP.
FMP/FINVIZ/IMA-dependent screeners need live retest before final promotion.
yfinance and pybroker live data paths may hit Yahoo rate limits and need cache/retry fallback.

skills.evidence: Broadest A-share data coverage; direct mode; replaces akshare/tushare/openclaw-stock-data for core.
Direct yfinance access; live test hit Yahoo rate limit, so needs retry/cache policy.
Best documented SEC/13F workflow; requires LLMQUANT_API_KEY and MCP.
Direct finance research knowledge base with strategies, indicators, sentiment, risk and backtesting references.
Direct policy monitoring and market-impact interpretation.
Structured macro workflows; requires LLMQuant live test.
Consolidates earnings, M&A, regulatory and catalyst workflows.
Market sentiment dashboards and event probability signals.
VIX regime, panic scoring, hedge design and research health checks.
Investor-style reasoning overlay grounded in LLMQuant Data.
Direct all-purpose US stock analysis across fundamentals, valuation and technicals.
Valuation-specific depth; overlaps with us-stock-analysis but has unique DCF/comps/SOTP role.
Direct SEPA/Minervini strategy framework; less API-dependent than screener-only skills.
Growth screening role; requires FMP live test.
VCP setup role; distinct from CANSLIM methodology.
Dividend/value screening role; requires FMP/FINVIZ live test.
Richest options workflow set; fallback is options-strategy-advisor if LLMQuant is unavailable.
33 offline tests passed; CLI starts after requirements install; live Yahoo data hit rate limit.
Methodology and robustness review, complementary to pybroker engine.
Live run produced JSON/Markdown with shares, position value and risk percentage.
17 tests passed; live monitor produced actionable A-share/ETF/gold alerts.
Live run succeeded and generated market breadth exposure guidance.
Generic read-only source reader; replaces channel-specific readers in core.
Distinct VC/job/founder perspective for startup investment research.
